seo.title: Gothic Remake Lockbreaker — Free Lockpicking Calculator
seo.description: Free Gothic 1 Remake lockpicking calculator with step-by-step walkthrough. Edge-safe sequences — pick won't snap. Works on phone, no account.
seo.ogImageAlt: Gothic Remake Lock Breaker solver showing tumbler mapping and a 3-turn lock sequence walkthrough

app.definitionBody: is a free, beginner-friendly solver for Gothic 1 Remake lockpicking — map your plates and get an edge-safe, turn-by-turn walkthrough.
app.bootError: Could not load translations. The solver may not work correctly — try refreshing the page.

howto.step1: Count the locks and pick the matching number above.
howto.step2: For each lock, set its starting hole (1 = wall, 4 = notch).
howto.step3: Turn that lock once in-game. Each other lock that moves — mark With (same way) or Against (opposite). With/Against apply to every turn direction for that pair.
howto.step4: Grinding means a pin hits wall 1 or 7 — not the same as an Against coupling.
howto.tierNote1: Training does not change how plates move on a legal turn — only mistake budget and (at Master) link removal after a broken pick.
howto.tierNote2: At Master, if you've snapped picks on this lock, set how many under The Lock, then tap Gone beside each dropped coupling on the tumbler cards before re-solving.
howto.imgAlt: In-game lock with five visible plates and pin holes along the top

panel.tumblersNote: Locks are numbered 1 (front) to N (back). Cards stack back at top, front at bottom, matching the in-game view. Hole 4 is the notch; holes 1 and 7 are walls.

map.turnOnce: Turn once → watch which plates move

guide.puzzleText: Gothic 1 Remake replaces the classic left-right guessing game with a plate-sliding puzzle. Every chest and door lock has 4 to 7 rotating plates, each carrying a golden pin on a seven-hole track. Holes are numbered 1 (left wall) through 7 (right wall), with 4 as the center notch where every pin must rest for the lock to open. Push a pin into wall 1 or 7 and your lockpick takes damage; enough mistakes break the pick and reset progress on Untrained.
guide.couplingTitle: Plate Couplings: With, Against, and None
guide.couplingText: Plates are linked by couplings. When you turn one plate, others may move With it (same direction), Against it (opposite direction), or not at all (None). These relationships form a coupling matrix unique to each lock. To scout them in-game, turn one plate a single step where it has room, watch which other plates shift, then mark With or Against on the tumbler cards. With and Against apply to every turn direction for that pair — they describe how plates interact, not a single move.
guide.tiersText: Three tiers control your mistake budget, not how plates move. Untrained allows 2 wall mistakes before the lock resets on a broken pick. Trained (10 LP + 100 ore from Fingers) raises that to 4 mistakes and keeps progress on break. Master (20 LP + 200 ore) allows 6 mistakes, keeps progress, and removes one random coupling after each broken pick — simplifying hard locks like the Old Camp tower door over time.
guide.trainerTitle: Where to Find the Lockpicking Trainer
guide.trainerText: Train with Fingers in the Old Camp, near Scatty's hut. He teaches Trained for 10 learning points and 100 ore, and Master for 20 LP and 200 ore. Training never changes plate movement on a legal turn — only how many wall hits you can survive and whether broken picks drop couplings at Master level.
guide.edgeSafeText: Net-turn calculators tell you how many total turns each plate needs but not a safe execution order. Follow net totals blindly and a coupled pin can hit a wall halfway through, snapping your pick. Gothic Remake Lock Breaker uses edge-safe breadth-first search: it only returns turn sequences that never grind any pin against holes 1 or 7, giving you a numbered walkthrough you can follow one step at a time beside the game.
guide.tipsText: Quick-save before a difficult chest — a reload is free insurance. Scout one plate at a time: turn it once, note every plate that moves, then undo before testing the next. Plates already near hole 4 are lower risk; edge pins at 1 or 7 need careful sequencing. For the Old Camp tower door, use the built-in preset under How to map your lock. If the solver reports no safe path, your coupling map is almost always wrong — re-check With/Against on each chip.

mastery.label: Lockpicking tier
mastery.bulletLinkRemoval: Snapped pick removes one plate link

breaks.hintZero: Only if you've already snapped picks on this lock: raise the count — each break drops one coupling in-game.
breaks.hintDone: Removed links marked. Hit Break the Lock when your couplings and start holes are set.
breaks.hintProgress: Tap Gone beside each coupling the game dropped ({removed} of {total}).

solution.blocked: Set each lock's start hole and couplings first.
solution.hintMap: Set each lock's start hole and couplings above, then crack it open.
solution.incompleteMapping: Mapping looks thin — add more couplings or start holes before solving.
solution.mappingChecklist: Set each lock's start hole. Mark couplings you observed in-game.
solution.oob: A pin starts outside the frame (holes 1–7). Tap each pin's hole to fix starting positions.
solution.noPath: No safe path with these couplings. Re-check With/Against on each chip, or open How to map your lock.
solution.noPathHint: Check each With/Against chip on the tumbler cards — couplings are directional.
solution.alreadyOpen: Nothing to do — every pin already rests in the notch.
solution.shareText: Copy link to share this exact lock.

walkthrough.lockOpen: Lock open — every pin in the notch.
walkthrough.helpLead: Usually a mapping issue, not your tier.
walkthrough.mismatch1: Re-check With/Against on each coupling — links are directional (column of the turned lock).
walkthrough.mismatch2: If a step moves the wrong way, try the opposite direction label (game mirror).
walkthrough.mismatch3: Confirm each lock's start hole matches in-game.
walkthrough.mismatch4: Snapped picks? Set the count under Master, then tap Gone beside each dropped coupling.

tutorOptIn.prompt: New to lock mapping? Take a 30s tour.

onboarding.footnote: Full reference in How to map your lock below.

step1.title: Step 1 · Lockpicking tier
step1.body: Pick your Fingers training level. Default Untrained is fine. Training changes mistake budget only — not how plates move.

step2.title: Step 2 · Count the locks
step2.body: Match the number of plates in the mechanism (4–7). Default is 6.

step3.title: Step 3 · Starting holes
step3.body: Tap each pin's hole. 1 and 7 are walls; 4 is the notch (goal).

step4.title: Step 4 · Couplings
step4.body: In-game, turn this lock once. Each lock that moves — tap its chip to With or Against. Master: tap Gone beside a coupling after a snapped pick drops it.

step5.title: Step 5 · Break the lock
step5.body: When mapping matches what you saw in-game, tap Break the Lock. You'll get a step-by-step turn sequence.

coachmark.title: Lock mapped
coachmark.body: Tap Break the Lock to see the sequence.
coachmark.hashFailureBody: Adjust start holes or couplings, then tap Break the Lock again.

confirm.wipe: Reset the lock? Couplings, pins, mastery tier, and count will return to defaults.

support.aria: Optional tip on Ko-fi — helps cover support and upkeep. Solver stays free.
support.tooltip: Toss an ore — keeps the solver free
support.portraitTip: Really? Is that all you got?

faq.q1: What is Gothic Remake Lock Breaker?
faq.a1: Gothic Remake Lock Breaker is a free browser-based lockpicking solver for Gothic 1 Remake. Map each plate's starting hole and couplings (With or Against), and it returns a step-by-step turn sequence that opens the lock.
faq.q2: How is it different from net-turn calculators?
faq.a2: Net-turn calculators only give total turns per plate. Gothic Remake Lock Breaker uses edge-safe search to find sequences that never grind a pin against wall holes 1 or 7, so your pick does not snap mid-sequence.
faq.q3: Is Gothic Remake Lock Breaker free?
faq.a3: Yes — free, no account, runs in any modern browser. Open gothiclockbreaker.com beside the game, map your lock, and follow the step-by-step walkthrough.
faq.q4: Can I use this solver on mobile?
faq.a4: Yes — Gothic Remake Lock Breaker runs in any modern mobile browser. Map your lock on your phone beside the game and follow the step-by-step walkthrough.
